summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Phase 3 features for Digital Register HMS. All 5 user-reported issues have been fixed and verified: 1) Auto-send WhatsApp on check-in working (3 messages: welcome, wifi, rules), 2) Room Management page working with add/edit/delete, 3) Voice button shows recording UI with Web Speech API fallback, 4) Full Channel Manager with 5 tabs working, 5) OCR scan fills consistent demo data. Backend 24/24 tests passed (100%), Frontend all features verified.
passed_tests: Backend: Owner and Staff authentication working
Backend: GET /api/settings returns wifi_name, wifi_password, hotel_rules
Backend: PUT /api/settings - Owner can update, Staff gets 403
Backend: GET /api/channels returns 5 seeded OTAs (OYO, MakeMyTrip, Booking.com, Agoda, Goibibo)
Backend: POST /api/channels - Owner can create, Staff gets 403
Backend: PUT /api/channels/{id}?is_active=false - Toggle channel working
Backend: GET/POST /api/channels/rates - Rate management working
Backend: GET /api/channels/bookings - Channel bookings retrieval
Backend: POST /api/channels/sync - Simulates OTA bookings
Backend: GET /api/channels/analytics - Returns channel breakdown
Backend: POST /api/rooms/manage - Owner can add room, Staff gets 403
Backend: PUT /api/rooms/manage/{room_number} - Owner can edit, Staff gets 403
Backend: DELETE /api/rooms/manage/{room_number} - Owner can delete, Staff gets 403
Backend: POST /api/bookings/checkin creates 3 WhatsApp logs (welcome, wifi, rules)
Backend: POST /api/expenses/voice parses text correctly (100 rupaye laundry → ₹100, laundry)
Backend: Check-in with source_channel stores OTA channel reference
Frontend: Room Management page loads with Add Room button
Frontend: Room Management shows edit/delete buttons for each room
Frontend: Channel Manager page loads with 5 tabs (Overview, Channels, Rates, Bookings, Sync)
Frontend: Channel Manager Overview shows analytics cards and channel breakdown
Frontend: Channel Manager Channels tab shows 5 OTAs with toggle switches
Frontend: Channel Manager Sync tab has Run Sync button
Frontend: Check-in page has Booking Source selector (Walk-in + 5 OTAs)
Frontend: OCR scan fills consistent demo data (Rajesh Kumar Patil, 9876543210, etc.)
Frontend: Galla page Voice button shows recording UI with text input fallback
Frontend: Voice expense form has record button and manual text input

mocked_apis.WhatsApp Business API: Messages logged to DB with 'mocked_sent' status
mocked_apis.Aadhar OCR: Simulated - fills fixed demo data (Rajesh Kumar Patil)
mocked_apis.OTA Channel Sync: Simulated - creates random bookings from active channels

seed_data_creation: 5 OTA channels seeded (OYO 25%, MakeMyTrip 20%, Booking.com 15%, Agoda 18%, Goibibo 20%), Hotel settings seeded with WiFi and rules
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 3 features fully tested. All 5 user-reported issues resolved: 1) Auto-send WhatsApp creates 3 logs on check-in, 2) Room Management CRUD working (owner-only), 3) Voice expense uses Web Speech API with text fallback, 4) Channel Manager has 5 tabs with full OTA management, 5) OCR fills consistent demo data. Role-based access verified (staff gets 403 on owner endpoints).

features_verified.auto_send_whatsapp: ✓ Check-in creates 3 WhatsApp logs (welcome, wifi, rules) automatically
features_verified.room_management: ✓ Owner can add/edit/delete rooms, Staff gets 403
features_verified.voice_button: ✓ Shows recording UI with Web Speech API, text input fallback works
features_verified.channel_manager: ✓ Full 5-tab interface (Overview, Channels, Rates, Bookings, Sync)
features_verified.ocr_fix: ✓ Fills consistent demo data (Rajesh Kumar Patil) instead of random
features_verified.booking_source: ✓ Check-in page has channel selector (Walk-in + 5 OTAs)
